/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_ssb_generators.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_ssb_generators.dir/ssb/factories.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ssb_generators.dir/ssb/dmrs_pbch_processor_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ssb_generators.dir/ssb/pss_processor_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ssb_generators.dir/ssb/sss_processor_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_ssb_generators.a
